BUSINESS GLOSSARY - Enterprise System
Last Updated: 2024-03-15
Status: Partial (pending review)

==========================================
CUSTOMER MANAGEMENT
==========================================

Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts)

Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer bu... [TRUNCATED]

DATA DICTIONARY - Enterprise Database
Version: 2.1 (incomplete documentation)
Last Updated: 2024-02-28

==========================================

==========================================

|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|

| CustomerID | INTEGER | ? | Possible duplicate of customer_id |
|... [TRUNCATED]

Foreign Keys:
- customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?)

|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------------|

| order_id | INTEGER | FK | References ORDERS |
| product_id | INTEGER | FK | R... [TRUNCATED]

==========================================
PAYMENTS
==========================================

| Column Name | Data Type | Constraints | Description |

| customer_id | INTEGER | FK | References CUSTOMERS |
| payment_date | DATETIME | ? | [missing docu... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Client
triplets.object: A person or company that purchases goods or services.

triplets.subject: Account Holder
triplets.object: The person designated as the primary owner of an account.

triplets.subject: End User
triplets.object: The actual user of a product or service, may differ from the purchaser.

triplets.subject: Order
triplets.object: A request to purchase products or services.

triplets.subject: Transaction
triplets.object: Similar to Order but more general.

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation.

triplets.subject: Quote
triplets.object: A preliminary order with estimated pricing, not yet confirmed.

triplets.subject: Item
triplets.object: Synonym for Product. Used in inventory context.

triplets.subject: SKU
triplets.object: Stock Keeping Unit - a unique identifier for a product variant.

triplets.subject: Payment
triplets.object: The transfer of money to settle an order.

triplets.subject: Shipment
triplets.object: The process of delivering goods to a customer.

triplets.subject: Delivery
triplets.object: The completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer.

triplets.subject: Fulfillment
triplets.object: The process of preparing and delivering orders.

triplets.subject: CUSTOMERS
triplets.object: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA)

triplets.subject: CUSTOMERS
triplets.object: Naming convention inconsistency discovered during audit

triplets.subject: CUSTOMERS
triplets.object: Some columns may be legacy duplicates

triplets.subject: CUSTOMERS
triplets.object: Check with application team before cleanup

entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Delivery
The completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer. | Invoice
A document requesting payment. Related to Bill. | Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts) | Order
A request to purchase products or services. Can be in various states. | Bill
A statement of money owed. Similar to Invoice. | Sales Order
An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation. Distinct from Quote. | Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. See Payment, Transaction. | - Pending: Awaiting processing | - customer_id → CUSTOMERS(customer_id or CustomerID?) | | CustomerID | INTEGER | ? | Possible duplicate of customer_id | | | CustomerID | INTEGER | FK | [FK reference unclear] | | | order_date | DATE | ? | Date order was created | | Merchandise
Goods available for sale. Similar to Product. | Revenue
Income from sales. The same as... [definition circular, see Sales] | - Refunded: Money returned | - Pending:
